info.description: Trial Balance Diagnostic Intelligence for Financial Professionals

delete.description: Clear all activity history for the user (soft-delete: sets archived_at).

get.description: Get the authenticated user's audit activity history.

post.description: Log audit activity. Stores only aggregate metadata, filename is hashed.

get.description: Export team activity as CSV.
Overview: seats, uploads this month, active members.
Filterable team activity log.
Per-member upload counts for the current month.

post.description: Compute accrual completeness estimator for a trial balance file.

delete.description: Clear all adjusting entries from the session.

get.description: List all adjusting entries in the current session.

post.description: Create a new adjusting journal entry.
Apply adjusting entries to a trial balance.

get.description: Get the next sequential reference number for adjusting entries.
Get available adjustment statuses for UI dropdowns.
Get available adjustment types for UI dropdowns.

delete.description: Delete an adjusting entry from the session.

get.description: Get a specific adjusting entry by ID.

put.description: Update the status of an adjusting entry.

post.description: Run automated AP payment testing on an accounts payable extract.

Run AR aging analysis on trial balance + optional sub-ledger.

ISA 540: Auditing Accounting Estimates (allowance for doubtful accounts).
ISA 500: Audit Evidence.
Reconcile bank statement against general ledger.

get.description:
Verify the integrity of the audit log hash chain between two record IDs.

Traverses the chain from start_id to end_id and recomputes each HMAC-SHA512
hash to detect tampering. Requires a verified user account.

Sprint 461: Cryptographic audit log chaining (SOC 2 CC7.4).

post.description: Compare current audit results to a saved prior period.
Compare two trial balance datasets at the account level.
Compare three trial balance datasets: Prior vs Current vs Budget/Forecast.

Add a single exchange rate for simple conversions.

If a rate table already exists, the rate is appended.
Otherwise, a new single-rate table is created.

delete.description: Clear the user's rate table from the session.

get.description: Check if the user has an active rate table in their session.

post.description:
Upload a CSV rate table for multi-currency conversion.

Expected CSV columns: effective_date, from_currency, to_currency, rate
Compute expense category analytical procedures for a trial balance file.

Run automated fixed asset register testing.

IAS 16/ASC 360: Property, Plant and Equipment assertions.
ISA 540: Auditing accounting estimates (depreciation, useful life, residual value).
Perform a Flux (Period-over-Period) Analysis.
Inspect an Excel workbook to retrieve sheet metadata.

Run automated inventory register testing.

IAS 2/ASC 330: Inventory assertions.
ISA 501: Audit Evidence — Inventory.
ISA 540: Auditing accounting estimates (NRV indicators).
Run automated journal entry testing on a General Ledger extract.
Run stratified random sampling on a General Ledger extract.
Preview stratum counts without running sampling.

get.description: Get available lead sheet options for UI dropdowns.

schema.title: Response Get Lead Sheet Options Endpoint Audit Lead Sheets Options Get

post.description: Run automated payroll & employee testing on a payroll register.
Compute population profile statistics for a trial balance file.
Run a lightweight data quality pre-flight assessment on a trial balance file.
Preview PDF table extraction with quality metrics before full parse.

Run automated revenue recognition testing on a revenue GL extract.

ISA 240: Presumed fraud risk in revenue recognition.

Design and select a statistical sample from an uploaded population.

ISA 530 / PCAOB AS 2315: Statistical sampling for substantive tests.

Phase 1 of 2: Upload population data + configure parameters.
Returns selected sample items for the auditor to test.

Evaluate a completed sample and determine Pass/Fail.

ISA 530 / PCAOB AS 2315: Sample evaluation using Stringer bound (MUS)
or ratio estimation (random).

Phase 2 of 2: Upload completed sample with audited amounts.
Returns projected misstatement, upper error limit, and conclusion.
Run three-way match validation across PO, Invoice, and Receipt files.
Analyze a trial balance file for balance validation using streaming processing.

get.description: Legacy health probe. Prefer /health/live (liveness) and /health/ready (readiness).

Liveness probe — orchestrator should use this for restart decisions.

Pure static response with zero I/O. If the process can serve this,
it is alive and should NOT be restarted.

Readiness probe — load balancer should use this for traffic routing.

Checks database connectivity with SELECT 1, measures latency, and
reports connection pool statistics when available (PostgreSQL).

Note: No Redis, Celery, or cache dependencies exist — database is
the only dependency.
